strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and React matching the primary stack
Direct AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators at current role
Strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, Vitest-era tooling, workshops on testing)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Limited recent Kotlin/Java exposure; Java work is from older robotics/mobile orchestration roles
Cloud experience centers on AWS; no clear GCP/Azure or Kubernetes production depth beyond self-hosted GISCollective
response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with over a decade of relevant TypeScript, Node.js, and React experience, current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work, and a strong testing/craftsmanship orientation that aligns well with the role's primary stack and quality expectations. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js experience and limited recent Kotlin/Java work, though the breadth of languages and architectural exposure suggests these are learnable.
